description:
Return a list of active Projects.

If the authenticated user has full company admin permissions the request will return all of the projects in the company. If the user does not have full company admin permissions, the request will only return the projects that the user has been added to.

See [Filtering on List Actions](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/filtering-on-list-actions) for information on using the filtering capabilities provided by this endpoint.

parameters.name: filters[by_status]
parameters.description: Filters on project status. Must be one of Active, Inactive, or All.

parameters.name: filters[name]
parameters.description: Filters projects to those matching the given string.

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[origin_id]
parameters.description: Origin ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Origin ID.

parameters.name: filters[from_project_template_id]
parameters.description: Filter projects by the project template ID they were created from. Returns projects that were created from the specified project template.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[synced]
parameters.description: If true, returns only item(s) with a `synced` status.

parameters.name: filters[vendor_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Vendor ID.

parameters.name: filters[custom_fields]
parameters.description: JSON object returns project with matching custom_field_values

parameters.name: serializer_view
parameters.description:
The 'compact' view only returns id, name and display_name. Passing any other value (or passing no value at all)
will result in the more complete list of attributes shown below.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Return items with the specified sort.

is_demo.description: Indicates whether this is a test project or not

id.description: The identifier for the parent project/job

name.description: The name for the parent project/job

display_name.description: The display name for the Project

address.description: The street address for the Project

city.description: The city in which the Project is located

state_code.description: The state code for the Project (ISO-3166 Alpha-2 format)

country_code.description: The country code for the Project (ISO-3166 Alpha-2 format)

zip.description: The postal code for the Project

county.description: The county in which the Project is located

time_zone.description: The timezone the Project is located in

latitude.description: The geographic coordinate that specifies the north–south position of the Project on the Earth's surface.

longitude.description: The geographic coordinate that specifies the east–west position of the Project on the Earth's surface.

stage.description: The name of the Project stage

id.description: The identifier for the Project Stage

name.description: The name for the Project Stage

id.description: The identifier for the Project template

name.description: The name of the Project template

phone.description: The telephone number for the Project

created_at.description: The date and time the Project was created

updated_at.description: The date and time the Project was last updated

active.description: The active status for the Project

origin_id.description: An external third-party identifier for the Project

origin_data.description: An external third-party data string associated with the Project

origin_code.description: An external third-party code associated with the Project

owners_project_id.description: A linked identifier for the Owner's Project

total_value.description: The total amount of construction work performed, planned, or put in place during the project. Note: this field is a replacement to estimated_value and will mirror its value.

store_number.description: The store number for the Project

accounting_project_number.description: The accounting project number for the Project

designated_market_area.description: The designated market area the Project is located in

project_region_id.description: The region identifier for the Project

project_bid_type_id.description: The Bid Type identifier for the Project

project_owner_type_id.description: The Owner Type identifier for the Project

photo_id.description: The unique identifier for the Project Photo

start_date.description: The start date for the project

completion_date.description: The completion date for the project

projected_finish_date.description: The projected finish date for the project

estimated_value.description: The Estimated Value of the project. Note: this field is now deprecated and will mirror the value of total_value until it is no longer supported.

fax.description: The fax number for the Project

sector.description: The sector of a project. (164 possible values)

work_scope.description: The work scope of a project.

delivery_method.description: The delivery method of a project.

estimated_budget.description: The estimated budget for the project

priority.description: The priority level for the project

project_sector_id.description: Id of the project sector associated with the project.
